assertion_results.text: Documentation includes a dedicated Error Responses section explaining the standard error format
assertion_results.evidence: Error Response Format section at top of doc with JSON example showing code, message, details structure

assertion_results.text: The standard error response schema is documented with fields: code, message, and details
assertion_results.evidence: Error format documented with code (ERROR_CODE), message (Human-readable), and optional details field

assertion_results.text: Each endpoint documents all possible error status codes (400, 404, 409, 422, 429, 500)
assertion_results.evidence: Endpoints document 404, 409, 422 errors. Missing 429 (RateLimitError) on individual endpoints and 500 (INTERNAL_ERROR). The error codes table lists them but per-endpoint coverage is incomplete.

assertion_results.text: Validation errors (400/422) include details about which fields failed and why
assertion_results.evidence: Validation Error Details section shows field-level errors with example: fields.name: ['String must contain at least 2 character(s)']

assertion_results.text: Custom error classes (NotFoundError, ConflictError) are mapped to their HTTP status codes
assertion_results.evidence: Error Codes table maps NOT_FOUND to 404, CONFLICT to 409, VALIDATION_ERROR to 422, RATE_LIMITED to 429, etc.

assertion_results.text: Zod schema validation rules are reflected in parameter constraints (min, max, regex, enum)
assertion_results.evidence: Request body tables show constraints from Zod: name 2-200 chars, sku regex ^[A-Z]{2,4}-\d{4,8}$, price positive max 999999.99, category enum, etc.

assertion_results.text: At least one error response example is shown per endpoint with realistic error data
assertion_results.evidence: GET /:id has a NOT_FOUND error example. POST /inventory has insufficient stock error example. But GET /products, POST /products, PUT, DELETE lack error response examples.

assertion_results.text: The OpenAPI spec includes error response schemas in the components section
assertion_results.evidence: components.schemas.ErrorResponse defined with code, message, details. components.responses includes ValidationError, NotFoundError, ConflictError with $ref to ErrorResponse schema.
